title: Senior Lighting Coordinator
description:
Senior Lighting Coordinator

Roles & Responsibilities: -

• Lead the coordination of project developments and implementation of lighting strategies based on different project requirements.

• Oversee lighting projects ensuring timely execution, technical compliance, and quality control of products.

• Serve as the primary technical subject-matter expert for both lighting and automation systems.

• Identify opportunities for innovation and simplification methodologies in lighting solutions across projects.

• Engage with senior management and stakeholders, providing regular digital updates on project status, achievements, and challenges.

• Install and configure lighting control systems, software, and hardware components, documenting processes for maintenance and support.

• Manage supplier relationships, procurement, and cost control for lighting equipment and materials.

• Train and mentor junior team members on lighting technologies and best practices.

• Ensure compliance with industry standards, safety regulations and company policies.

• Willing to travel regionally for project coordination and implementation.

• Prepare quotations, cost analysis, and procurement strategies for lighting projects.

• Conduct Dialux simulations and prepare comprehensive project proposals, including technical drawings and specifications.

• Coordinate with internal and external teams to ensure smooth project execution.

• Optimize and improve processes through digitalization and automation.

• Manage client relationships, addressing project concerns and ensuring customer satisfaction.

• Develop an in-depth understanding of lighting products and conduct presentations to high-end clients.

• Identify and engage with new clients while maintaining relationships with existing clients to achieve revenue targets.

• Keep detailed, up-to-date records of all sales activities, including meetings, sales opportunities, projects, and forecasts.

• Submit weekly sales reports detailing progress and achievements.

• Perform other ad hoc duties as assigned by the Head of Department.


Requirements: -

Education and Qualification Requirements

• Professional Certificate/ NiTec, Diploma, Advanced/ Higher/ Graduate Diploma, bachelor’s degree, Post Graduate Diploma, Professional Degree in Electrical Engineering, Lighting Design, Product Design or related fields.

• 3 + years of relevant experience in lighting, building automation, or electrical solutions.


Experience Requirements

• Minimum 3 years of experience in a technical, project management, or business development role within the lighting trade industry.

• Proven experience in managing lighting projects from inception to completion.

• Sales and project experience in the lighting/automation trade is advantageous.


Knowledge, Skills, and Abilities Requirements

• Proficient in Microsoft Office, AutoCAD, CRM systems, and project management tools.

• Strong knowledge of IT networks, building automation, and lighting control systems.

• Expertise in Dialux for lighting simulations and project proposals.

• Excellent attention to detail, problem-solving, and communication skills.

• Ability to work independently and lead teams effectively.

• Knowledge of procurement processes, cost optimization, and client relationship management in lighting projects.


Additional Eligibility Qualifications

• Background in sales and marketing within the lighting industry.

• General Engineering background in Civil & Electrical is advantageous.

• Entrepreneurial mindset with a proactive approach to business growth

• Class 3A Driving License (preferred only)

Working hours:

Mon-Fri - 9:00am - 6:30pm ,

Sat - 9:00am - 1:00pm

Company Overview

If you’re seeking for employment or employees, you’re at the right place.Welcome to Flintex Consulting, a leading Recruitment Agency in Singapore.


We Match                                            We Guide                                            We Place


We specialize in Technology, BFSI, Human Resource & Administration, Engineering & Manufacturing, Sales & Marketing,Finance & Accounting sectors.We cater to the needs of a) individual job candidates and b) companies seeking for the right employees to drive their business.


We have been able to construe and bridge the needs and demands of our individual and corporate clients. Our wide industry expertise and select client base enable us to foster fruitful careers rather than short-term jobs and placements.Our advanced placement platform is designed to match employee skill sets with current vacancies with perfect accuracy. We utilize an efficient, systematic and ultra-precise recruitment method that surpasses industry standards.


Flintex Consulting has been successful in collaborating multiple leading employers, vendors and clients. We also offer valuable insight to candidates and companies to maximize their recruitment efforts. Candidates are mentored towards finding the best-fit jobs to help build successful careers.We cover all levels of placement, from entry level professionals to mid-level and CEO level posts.We promise to provide the best suited jobs through our research-based methodologies merged with our top qualified personnel.


Flintex Consulting promises to grow your career the right way. Whether you are a client or a candidate, we have a streamlined platform to match your needs efficiently. With professional, efficient, and timely services, leave it to us when it comes to your Job-Related needs.We take pride in collaborating with leading employers, vendors, and clients. This helps us provide you with extensive job postings across all Major Industries. Additionally, we offer valuable insights and other personalized services designed to maximize productivity and results when it comes to job search.

Why Join Us?

To appreciate the responsibility that we assume in assisting people to make important recruitment decisions that can have a significant impact on their lives.Undertake our roles with a sense of dignity, optimism, pride and gratitude.


Our Core Values

Recruitments, Staff Augmentation, Contract Staffing, Salary Advisory, Temporary Hiring, Executive Search, Project based Search, RPO, Payroll Services, Work Pass Application, Leadership Hiring, and Trainings
